titleStmt.title: SII 17.231: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 231. (A.R. No. 209 of 1904.) MĒLŚĒVŪR, GINGEE TALUK, South ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vṛishabhapurīśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Tiṅgaḷērtaru etc., of Rājādhirāja I.

It records the gift of 96 sheep for a perpetual lamp for god Tiruttāntōṉṟi Mahādēva in Kīḻvaḻich-Chēvūr in Śiṅgapura-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, by Nārāyaṇaṉ Rājarājaṉ alias Kēraḷāntaka-ppallavaraiyan, the kiḻavaṉ of Vāñjiyūr and the Perun danam officer.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .
tiṅkaḷerta
ru(t)eṉṟoṅkal
veṇkuṭaikki
ḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmaka
ṭpuṇarntu ceṅkolo
ccik karuṅkali kaṭintu ma
ṉṉupallūḻiyuḷ te
ṉṉavar kulamakaṉ māṉā
paraṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyā
ṉāpparumatiṭ pacuntalai
porukaḷattarintu virakera
ḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvitta
caivil cuntara pāṇṭi
yaṉait ticaikeṭat to
llaiyil mullaiyūr
tturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭarai
caic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupuka ḻirāmakuṭa mūvar keṭa muṉintu
velai keḻu kāntaḷūrc cālai kalamaṟuppit tāhavamallaṉumañcak
kevutaṉ (n)ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuṅ kaṇṭappayaṉum kaṅ
kātiraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaru vikkiyuḷ vi
caiyātittaṉu ntarumuraṭ caṅkamayaṉu mutali camara pīru vottuṭaiya nimir
cuṭarp ponṉoṭayṅkeri puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyil cayaṅ
koṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuttu villavar mīṉavar
veñciṉac caḷukkiyar vallavar mutaliṉar vaṇaṅka vīṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭa
(koṇṭa) coḻaṉ Uyartaru perumpukaṭ korājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī
rājātirājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu rājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭuc ciṅkapuranāṭṭuk kiḻvaḻic cevūrt tiruttāntoṉṟi mahāteva
rkkup perun=tanattu vāñciyūr kiḻavaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ rājarājaṉ Āṉa
keraḷān=takap pallavaraiyan vaitta tirunon=tā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉāl
vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu Ivai cāvāmuvāp perāṭu Āvatākavu
m Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟiṉālum rājakecariyāl nicatam Uḻak
ku neyyiṭa muṟaiy Uruttira civaṉ Īcāṉa śivaṉ pakka
l Aṭṭak kaṭavatāka Ivai can=tirātittavaṟ celum . Ittanma
m panmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.231 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
